evidence: "There is enough suspense and drama, along with romance, to make this series move along quickly."
"I wish Hollywood would make more wholesome movies."
"It is entertaining to watch, with enough twists and turns in the story line that keeps one coming back for more."
"This movie is pretty predictable, but it does keep your interest and entertains."
"Season 6 has 18 episodes, which is more than some, and they move along quickly."
"Quality is good, and we had no issues with picture or sound."
"I was surprised that this movie was as good as it was."
"We love Rizzoli & Isles, and have all seasons."
"I can't really tell the difference on my 46 inch TV, and it is considerably less expensive this way."
"This movie was very touching. Kept my interest all the way through..."
"I will miss this series when it is done..."

summary: The user enjoys fast-paced mystery and drama series, particularly those with elements of romance. They show a strong preference for familiar series like Rizzoli & Isles and Bones, and value emotional engagement in their viewing experiences.
